name: @omadia/knowledge-graph-neon
description: Neon-Postgres + pgvector KnowledgeGraph provider plugin for the byte5 Harness — provides 'knowledgeGraph@1' + 'entityRefBus@1' + 'graphPool@1'. Production backend (durable storage, vector search, embedding-backfill scheduler, schema migrations). Operator picks this OR the in-memory sibling plugin in the RequiresWizard. S+11-2a: implementations (NeonKnowledgeGraph + Pool + Migrator + Schema + EmbeddingBackfill + migrations/) moved here from @omadia/knowledge-graph; the old package now imports them transitively. Capability ownership flips in S+11-2b once the manifest declares provides:.
